response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Docker), and recent AI-agent work with MCP and agentic workflows aligns with required GenAI/cloud skills. However, his AI-specific experience lacks depth in vector databases, RAG architectures, and multi-agent systems, and his resume shows limited direct experience with production-grade AI systems or LLM optimization.
strengths: Proven full-stack engineering expertise with TypeScript/Node.js and cloud platforms (AWS CDK, Docker)
Recent experience contributing to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, showing adaptability to GenAI tools
Demonstrated ability to lead technical projects and mentor teams, evidenced by workshop creation and open-source contributions
concerns: Limited direct experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent system frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI)
No explicit mention of building data pipelines for structured/unstructured data or AI system evaluation pipelines
Resume lacks clear evidence of leading technical discovery sessions with stakeholders or optimizing LLM performance metrics
